'''Adin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], located on [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. Few in the galactic community trusted the bureaucrats that the planets put in power. With the election of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Meido]] to the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] [[17 ABY/Legends|thirteen years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the planets dealings were closely watched by former [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].
